## platy app register

Register an application from applications.yaml and generate code

```
platy app register <name> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --description string   description override for the registered application
      --endpoint string      endpoint override for the registered application
  -h, --help                 help for register
      --skip-codegen         skip protobuf code generation after registration
```

### SEE ALSO

* [platy app](platy_app.md)	 - Manage application registrations in the gateway registry
